hero.title: Join Our Hotel Association Network
hero.subtitle: Connect your hotel association with Nomad Heaven and start generating commissions for every booking made by our digital nomads.

globalNetwork.title: Global Network

digitalNomads.title: Digital Nomads

secureManagement.title: Secure Management
secureManagement.description: Secure control panel to manage hotels and commissions.

steps.title: Register
steps.description: Complete the registration form with your hotel association data.

steps.title: Add Hotels
steps.description: Add your association's hotels to our platform from your panel.

steps.title: Generate Commissions
steps.description: Receive commissions automatically for every booking made at your hotels.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Join our hotel association network and start generating additional income today.

slogans: WE ARE POSSIBLE MASS OCCUPANCY FOR YOUR AFFILIATED HOTELS
WE ARE A GREAT SOURCE OF INCOME FOR YOUR ASSOCIATION

lines: WE ARE THE GLOBAL HOTEL REVOLUTION
THAT YOUR ASSOCIATION CAN BE THE FIRST

note.highlight: This income does not affect hotels at all
note.description: It comes from our own management cost (10%) and can be reinvested for the benefit of the association and its members.

labels.rooms: HOW MANY EMPTY ROOMS DAILY ON AVERAGE?

advantages.title: WHAT ADVANTAGES DO YOUR ASSOCIATED HOTELS GET BY REGISTERING THROUGH YOUR ASSOCIATION?
items: Preferred positioning in results
Guaranteed publication in 48 hours
Visually highlighted listing
Automatic participation in local campaigns
Official "allied hotel" tag
Right to direct feedback with the Hotel-Living team
Inclusion in promotional draws
Personalized assisted onboarding
Free review of their listing
Priority translation of their listing to other languages
Cumulative benefit if they refer other hotels (not belonging to any association)
Early access to new Hotel-Living system modules
To test features before their official launch
Priority attention in technical support and incident resolution
Free access to exclusive training on long-stay optimization and revenue management for their team
A personalized monthly mention or publication (rotating)
"Top Association Hotel" tag on their listing during the first 3 months
Higher frequency of appearance in personalized affinity segments
Preferred invitation to meetings or round tables with other allied hotels

clients.title: HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF CUSTOMERS ARE WAITING
items: Active retirees who want to truly live
Online workers and digital nomads
Professionals in dormitory cities
Tenants tired of difficulties
Frequent travelers seeking soul
Users of improvised apartments
Free souls who want everything resolved
Citizens who wish to break loneliness and meet like-minded people
conclusion: They all have something in common: they seek a new way of living.
It's no longer about renting. It's no longer about traveling.
And for all that, the hotel is the natural solution.
Deployed in phases with revolutionary modules
Currently only deployed at 20% of its totality

text: * The figures presented are estimates based on maximum occupancy potential.
Actual results may vary based on the number of packages actually sold and the average monthly price.
The latter —set at $1,300— represents a weighted average that considers stays without meal service, as well as hotels of different categories, with both single and double occupancies.

benefits.title: We are Hotel-Living and these are some of the direct benefits for your affiliated members
items: We eliminate low and medium seasons.
We radically multiply hotel profits.
We activate 100% profitability of vacant rooms.
The hotel collects 5% of each reservation in advance, non-refundable net profit.
No subscriptions – No memberships – No monthly fees – No forced contracts – No advance costs – No adaptations.
We recover clients who chose vacation rentals.
We reduce operational costs.
We bring longer and more profitable stays.
We unify check-ins and check-outs on a single weekly day.
We simplify daily management.
We provide absolute staff stability.
We fill hotels with life and attractiveness.
We bring hotels their ideal clients according to affinities chosen by the hotel itself.
We connect your association with a new era of profitability and stability.
